flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at ATA College rose 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($17.7k → $21.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at ATA College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at ATA College rose 90% between 2021 and 2024 (44.7% → 84.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at ATA College rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 (286 → 363).
